raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding a problematic transaction with XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXX/XX/year>, I purchased XXXX items directly from XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX The total transaction amounts were {$3200.00} ( Ref. No. XXXX ) and {$7000.00} ( Ref. No. XXXX ). 

First, XXXX shipped the wrong lens instead of the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX I had ordered XXXX I returned it using their provided shipping label and have confirmation of signature upon receipt at their return facility. Next, I received the camera, but given the incorrect lens shipment, I no longer needed it. I immediately returned the camera, again using a XXXX return label, and obtained signature confirmation proving delivery. 

Despite this, XXXX now claims they never received any returned merchandise. I have documented proof of the returns, including shipping and signature confirmations. I have attempted to resolve this matter with both XXXX and my credit card issuer, but neither has issued a refund. I am left with no merchandise and no reimbursement for my returned items. 

I respectfully request that the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau assist in resolving this issue and ensuring I receive the full refund owed to me.
